title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
optimized_headline: BBVA Integrates OpenAI to Transform the Future of Banking
raw_excerpt: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
raw_body: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
speedrun: BBVA has integrated ChatGPT Enterprise across its workforce of 100,000 employees, partnering with OpenAI to enhance its banking services. This collaboration aims to transform banking by leveraging AI technology for improved customer interactions and operational efficiency. The move highlights a significant shift in how traditional banks are adopting AI tools. As banks increasingly embrace AI, this could reshape customer experiences in the financial sector.
why_it_matters: BBVA's employees will benefit from AI tools that streamline processes and enhance customer service, potentially leading to better job performance.
This partnership signals a broader trend where banks are increasingly relying on AI to stay competitive and meet evolving customer expectations.

lenses.eli12: BBVA is using AI to improve banking for everyone. By giving 100,000 employees access to ChatGPT, they can respond to customers faster and more accurately. Think of it like having a smart assistant that helps you with your banking questions. This matters because it could make banking services more efficient and user-friendly for all customers.
lenses.pm: For product managers and founders, BBVA's move to integrate AI highlights a growing user need for efficient banking solutions. By leveraging ChatGPT, they could reduce response times and enhance customer satisfaction. This partnership with OpenAI shows the importance of adopting advanced technologies to remain competitive in the financial market.
lenses.engineer: BBVA's deployment of ChatGPT Enterprise across 100,000 employees reflects a significant engineering effort in scaling AI solutions. The partnership with OpenAI suggests a focus on using advanced language models to enhance customer interactions and operational processes. This could lead to improved benchmarks in service efficiency and customer satisfaction, although the specific performance metrics were not detailed.
